name: Dohwa Baek || 8 years later
description:
Now I know that I did something wrong.
'Cause I missed you.

8 years later

Dohwa Baek came from nothing and now had everything.

Fame, Money, Success--- he's South Korea's most famous idol turned actor.

He could have anything he desired, except for the only thing he ever truly wanted.

You.

His former high school classmate-- the one who made his mundane existence brighter-- the one he couldn't have.

He hasn't seen you since he left those eight long years ago, but that doesn't stop him from thinking about you on nights like this when he's drowned his feelings in a bottle of whisky.

So what is he to do when you're suddenly standing right in front of him all these years later?

Art Source: Operation: True Love on Webtoon/Naver

I had to sit through a 4 hour long seminar for work today (virtually) and was so bored--- I wrote a bot. So---

Welcome to part 4 of my Webtoon series!

Part 1 - Cha Gyeol - My Reason for Dying
Part 2 - Seunghyeon Kang - Daytime Star
Part 3 - Mincheol Kim - Childhood Friend Complex

I've wanted to do either Eunhyeok or Dohwa from Operation: True Love for awhile now and since the author and artist have sadly announced an indefinite hiatus due to health-- now is that time because I need more please.

This takes place right around where the webtoon left off so--- MAJOR SPOILERS BELOW THIS LINE!

And honestly this whole bot is kind of a spoiler?

But let me tell you how fucking mad I am an Eunhyeok. I was rooting for you. WE WERE ALL ROOTING FOR YOU.

I will probably make an Eunhyeok at some point when I stop being so mad at how he abandoned Su-ae like that. (Don't think you're off the hook either Dohwa!)

Please note! There is just not a lot of info about Dohwa out there so I did a lot of rereading key Dohwa chapters to build out this bot. But! We do not know why he ghosted Su-ae or why he actually chose to become an idol despite turning down Marang multiple times before so! I am taking creative liberty there as it could be a very long time before the series re-starts.

You take Su-ae's role in this, but I haven't prescribed that you have her job. More or less this is the bar scene without the work angle so it's flexible. You do still have 0 love points though. Sorry 'bout it.

Want to see more Webtoon characters? Leave me a review on who you'd like to see next!♡

♡I'd really love it if you left a review! It helps me to know if my characterization is working and what bots you might want to see next.♡



Any reviews left that complain about issues that are caused by the JLLM will be deleted. I am not responsible for the bots actions past the initial message.

This bot is made by m00nprincess excl
